title: data-us pack=memo-fetch output
description: Pack output for `data-us/scripts/pack.py --ticker {T} --pack memo-fetch`. Heavy bundle: yfinance info + 2y price + SEC EDGAR filings index (10-K/10-Q/8-K, last 8) + SEC XBRL us-gaap concept facts. Single ticker only by design (SEC EDGAR is rate-limited 10 req/s).

company_info.description: yfinance info dict — same shape as snapshot.company_info (see schema-snapshot.json). Tier 2.

price_history.description: yfinance OHLCV — same shape as snapshot.price_history (see schema-snapshot.json). Tier 2.

sec_filings.description: SEC EDGAR filings index for the requested forms (Tier A — official primary source).

cik.description: 10-digit SEC CIK (may render as int or zero-padded string).

title.description: Issuer name as registered with SEC.

sec_facts.description: SEC XBRL company-concept facts index (Tier A). When `concept` is null, returns the full index of available concepts (us-gaap + dei taxonomies) and their counts. Specific concept values can be fetched via separate sec_edgar_client.py calls — not bundled here for size.

concept.description: Specific us-gaap concept (e.g. 'Revenues') if requested; null when fetching the full concept index.

concept_counts.description: Per-taxonomy counts: typically `{us-gaap: N, dei: M}`.

us_gaap_concepts.description: List of available us-gaap concept names for this issuer (e.g. 'Revenues', 'NetIncomeLoss', 'AccountsPayable', ...).

dei_concepts.description: List of available DEI (Document and Entity Information) concept names.
